info.title: ShoppingList Python API
info.x-postman-notes: On POST /api/v1/auth/login, save access_token to collection variable jwt_token. Protected endpoints use BearerAuth with {{jwt_token}}.

schema.title: Response Health Api V1 Health Get

x-postman-tests: pm.test('JWT token saved to collection variable', function () {

Response Member Check Api V1 Lists  List Id  Member Check Get
Response Owner Check Api V1 Lists  List Id  Owner Check Get

BearerAuth.description: Use JWT from login response. In Postman set token as {{jwt_token}}.
